Class CanvasData

java.lang.Object
canvas.CanvasData
public class CanvasData extends Object
Stores all pixel data for WigglyPaint's canvas, including the base framebuffer and two animated “wiggle” frames.

Responsibilities:

  • Maintain pixel buffers for base + wiggle layers
  • Provide read/write access to layers
  • Handle safe pixel-setting with bounds checks
  • Convert any framebuffer to a BufferedImage for GIF export or screenshots
Pixel values are stored as small byte indices that map to theme-controlled Color values.

  • Constructor Details

    • CanvasData

      public CanvasData()
      Constructs a new canvas and fills wiggle frames with BG color.

  • Method Details

    • getSize

      public int getSize()
      Returns:
      the canvas width/height (square).

    • raw

      public byte[][] raw()
      Returns:
      raw base framebuffer.

    • A

      public byte[][] A()
      Returns:
      wiggle animation frame A.

    • B

      public byte[][] B()
      Returns:
      wiggle animation frame B.

    • set

      public void set(int layeridx, int x, int y, byte index)
      Writes a pixel value into one of the canvas layers. Safely ignores coordinates outside the canvas bounds.
      Parameters:
      layeridx - which framebuffer to modify (0, 1, or 2)
      x - x coordinate
      y - y coordinate
      index - color index to write

    • clearAll

      public void clearAll(byte color)
      Clears all canvas layers to a given color index.
      Parameters:
      color - the byte index to fill all pixels with

    • toBufferedImage

      public BufferedImage toBufferedImage(byte[][] frame)
      Converts a framebuffer into a BufferedImage.

      Each framebuffer pixel stores a byte color index which maps to theme colors from ThemeManager. The resulting image is ARGB and ready for GIF export, saving, or preview.

      Parameters:
      frame - the framebuffer to convert (pixels, A, or B)
      Returns:
      a BufferedImage representing the frame
